data.title: BNB's market capitalization surpassed $130 billion, reaching a new high, surpassing BYD to become the 167th largest asset in the world.
data.description: The latest data from Coingecko shows that BNB's market capitalization has surpassed $130 billion, currently reaching $130,709,165,488, a new all-time high. Its trading volume over the past 24 hours reached $1,567,534,217. Furthermore, according to 8 MarketCap, BNB's market capitalization has surpassed BYD, ranking 167th globally by market capitalization.

data.title: Binance announced that it will open the Binance Alpha airdrop at 22:00 today, with the airdrop threshold being 220 Alpha points.
data.description: Binance has officially announced that it will launch the Binance Alpha airdrop at 22:00 (UTC+8). Users holding at least 200 Binance Alpha Points can claim the tokens on a first-come, first-served basis until the airdrop pool is fully redeemed or the event ends. Specific airdrop currencies will be announced later.

data.title: A whale is long BTC, DOGE, and other tokens with high leverage, and its current floating profit exceeds $9 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale (0 xebb 2...0 a 03) is using maximum leverage to buy long positions in BTC, DOGE, PEPE, and FARTCOIN, with a current unrealized profit exceeding $9 million. The whale has set take-profit limit orders: 1,250 BTC (worth $145 million) with a take-profit price between $117,000 and $127,000; 75 million DOGE (worth $22.4 million) with a take-profit price between $0.35 and $0.7; 1.5 billion PEPE (worth $18.5 million) with a take-profit price between $0.015 and $0.03; and 20 million FARTCOIN (worth $18.5 million) with a take-profit price between $1.2 and $1.6.

data.title: Figure's Pressure on DeFiLlama Criticized by Blockchain Analyst
data.description: According to Foresight News, blockchain analyst ZachXBT has criticized Figure, a blockchain lending platform, for exerting public pressure on DeFiLlama. ZachXBT highlighted that Figure is attempting to influence honest participants like DeFiLlama using its RWA metrics, which cannot be fully verified on-chain.

data.title: BNB briefly broke through 940 USDT, setting a new historical high
data.description: Market data shows that BNB briefly broke through 940 USDT, setting a new historical high. It is currently at 938.72 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 3.38%.

data.title: Circle executives: About 90% of USDC-anchored asset reserves are managed by BlackRock
data.description: According to Caixin, at the Asia Vision Forum 2025 in Singapore, David A. Katz, Vice President of Strategy and Public Policy for Asia Pacific at Circle, the company that issues the USDC stablecoin, stated that cross-border transactions are a key application scenario for stablecoins, and therefore issuing a RMB-denominated stablecoin would help promote the internationalization of the renminbi. Katz emphasized that the issuance of digital assets must meet two core requirements: first, ensuring network security to prevent hacker attacks; and second, that digital assets must be 1:1 anchored to real, high-quality, and highly liquid assets and held in custody by appropriate institutions. Notably, he revealed that approximately 90% of the USDC-backed asset reserves are held by BlackRock.

data.title: BNB Market Cap Reaches New High, Surpasses BYD in Global Rankings
data.description: According to PANews, recent data from 8MarketCap reveals that BNB's market capitalization has reached a new peak of $130.55 billion. This marks a 3.38% increase over the past 24 hours, propelling BNB to surpass BYD in global asset market value rankings, securing the 167th position worldwide.

data.title: China Advances Data Security in Automotive Industry
data.description: According to PANews, Li Jianguo, Deputy Director of the Digital Technology and Infrastructure Construction Department at the National Data Bureau, emphasized the importance of balancing data development and security. He highlighted the need to accelerate the establishment of a comprehensive security management mechanism covering the entire data lifecycle in the automotive industry, including data collection, transmission, storage, processing, and destruction. Li also advocated for the application of privacy protection computing and blockchain technologies to ensure trusted data circulation within the industry.

data.title: Blockstream Issues Alert Over Fake Email Phishing Campaign Targeting Hardware Wallet Users
data.description:
Blockstream issued an urgent security alert warning users about a sophisticated phishing campaign targeting Jade hardware wallet owners through fake firmware update emails that masquerade as legitimate communications while directing users to download malicious files from suspicious domains.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/blockstream-issues-alert-over-fake-email-phishing-campaign-targeting-hardware-wallet-users/

data.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs See $642M Inflows, Ether ETFs Add $405M Amid Rising Institutional Confidence
data.description: Key TakeawaysSpot Bitcoin ETFs recorded $642M in inflows Friday, extending their winning streak to five days.Spot Ether ETFs attracted $405M, their fourth consecutive day of gains.Fidelity and BlackRock funds led both Bitcoin and Ether inflows, with cumulative assets now exceeding $180B combined.Analysts say flows reflect renewed institutional confidence and stronger liquidity outlook.Bitcoin ETF Inflows Cross $56.8BSpot Bitcoin ETFs recorded $642.35 million in net inflows on Friday, marking their fifth straight day of gains, according to SoSoValue.Cumulative net inflows: $56.83 billionTotal net assets: $153.18 billion (≈ 6.62% of Bitcoin’s market cap)Trading volumes: $3.89 billion across all spot Bitcoin ETFs Fidelity’s FBTC topped the leaderboard with $315.18M in new inflows, while BlackRock’s IBIT followed with $264.71M. Both funds recorded daily gains above 2%, reflecting strong positioning from institutional investors.In total, Bitcoin spot ETFs have now seen $2.34 billion in net inflows over the past five sessions, reversing the slower start to September.Ether ETFs See $405M InflowsEther ETFs mirrored Bitcoin’s momentum, securing $405.55 million in net inflows on Friday, their fourth consecutive positive session.Cumulative net inflows: $13.36 billionTotal net assets: $30.35 billionTrading volumes: Led by BlackRock’s ETHA with $1.86 billionBlackRock’s ETHA drew $165.56M, while Fidelity’s FETH added $168.23M. Analysts noted that the strong trading volumes in Ether ETFs signal growing confidence in Ethereum’s institutional adoption.Institutional Sentiment Turns Risk-On“Bitcoin and Ethereum spot ETFs keep seeing strong inflows, showing rising institutional confidence,” said Vincent Liu, CIO of Kronos Research.“If macro conditions hold, this surge could strengthen liquidity and drive momentum for both assets,” he added.The inflows highlight a broader risk-on tilt in crypto markets, with both BTC and ETH extending gains on macro-driven optimism about Federal Reserve policy.BlackRock Eyes Tokenization of ETFsAmid the surge in ETF demand, BlackRock is reportedly exploring tokenization of ETFs on blockchain networks, particularly for funds tied to real-world assets (RWA).Tokenized ETFs could offer investors 24/7 trading, seamless settlement, and DeFi integration, but regulatory hurdles remain a key challenge.
